mapper.select: SELECT * FROM charging_request WHERE car_id = #{carId} ORDER BY request_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM charging_request WHERE car_id = #{carId} AND request_status IN ('WAITING', 'QUEUED_AT_PILE', 'CHARGING') ORDER BY request_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT vehicle_id as vehicleId, plate_number as plateNumber, vehicle_type as vehicleType, battery_capacity as batteryCapacity FROM vehicle ORDER BY vehicle_id
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO vehicle (vehicle_id, plate_number, vehicle_type, battery_capacity) VALUES (#{vehicleId}, #{plateNumber}, #{vehicleType}, #{batteryCapacity})
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicle SET car_state = #{carState} WHERE vehicle_id = #{carId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM charging_request WHERE pile_id = #{pileId} AND request_status IN ('QUEUED_AT_PILE', 'CALLED', 'CHARGING') ORDER BY queue_position ASC
SELECT * FROM charging_request WHERE request_mode = #{requestMode} AND request_status = 'WAITING' ORDER BY request_time ASC
SELECT battery_capacity FROM vehicle WHERE vehicle_id = #{carId}
